task: Find and open an animal learning course on YouTube Kids for my 6-year-old without login in. As a parent born in 1992, I would prefer not to enable search.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated from YouTube to YouTube Kids, opened the Learning category, and selected an animal-themed educational video: “Toddler Learning with Ms Rachel - Learn Zoo Animals - Kids Songs - Educational Videos for Toddlers.” The final snapshot shows the YouTube Kids watch page with that video open and playing. There was no login prompt, and the YouTube Kids interface shown does not display a search control, which is consistent with the user's preference not to enable search. The task was therefore completed.
final_result_response:
Done. I opened **“Toddler Learning with Ms Rachel - Learn Zoo Animals - Kids Songs - Educational Videos for Toddlers”** in **YouTube Kids**.

I did not log in or enable search. Search is not showing on the YouTube Kids page.
action_history: Opening YouTube: const ytPage1 = await openTab('https://www.youtube.com/');
Opening YouTube Kids from YouTube: await ytPage1.locator('e67').click();
Opening animal learning video: await page.locator('e169').click();
